title: Unreal Past — Advanced Conditionals
description: Mixed and inverted conditionals — removing IF and leading with HAD / WERE / SHOULD.
summary_pt_br: Conditional invertida (sem IF): 'Had I known...', 'Were she here...', 'Should you need...'. Formal e elegante.

scenes.subtitle_en: Mixed and inverted conditionals — removing IF and leading with HAD / WERE / SHOULD.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Conditional invertida (sem IF): 'Had I known...', 'Were she here...', 'Should you need...'. Formal e elegante.

scenes.text_en: Mixed and inverted conditionals — removing IF and leading with HAD / WERE / SHOULD. Focus: unreal past — advanced conditionals. Had I known the truth, I would have stayed.
scenes.text_pt: Conditional invertida (sem IF): 'Had I known...', 'Were she here...', 'Should you need...'. Formal e elegante. Foco: unreal past — advanced conditionals. Se eu soubesse a verdade, teria ficado.

scenes.title: Unreal Past — Advanced Conditionals
scenes.body_en: Inverted: 'HAD I known, I would have acted.' = 'If I had known.' 'WERE she here, she would agree.' 'SHOULD you need help, call me.' More formal, stylistically elegant.
scenes.body_pt: Conditional invertida (sem IF): 'Had I known...', 'Were she here...', 'Should you need...'. Formal e elegante.

examples.en: Had I known the truth, I would have stayed.
examples.pt: Se eu soubesse a verdade, teria ficado.

examples.en: Were she here, the conversation would be livelier.
examples.pt: Se ela estivesse aqui, a conversa seria mais animada.

examples.en: Should you need anything, please reach out.
examples.pt: Se precisar de algo, entre em contato.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Unreal Past — Advanced Conditionals

exercise.question: Complete: "Had I known the truth, I would have ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Had I known the truth, I would have stayed."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Se eu soubesse a verdade, teria ficado.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Were she here, the conversation would be livelier.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Were she here, the conversation would be livelier."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Se ela estivesse aqui, a conversa seria mais animada.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Unreal Past — Advanced Conditionals — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre unreal past — advanced conditionals. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Invert: 'If I had known, I would have come earlier.'

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Had I known, I would have come earlier.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: 'If she were here, she would help us.'

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Were she here, she would help us.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: 'If you need anything, let me know.'

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Should you need anything, let me know.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Mixed conditional. 'If I had studied, I'd be a lawyer.'

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Had I studied, I would be a lawyer now.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Use inversion in a condolence note.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Had we known, we would have been there.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Inversion gives conditionals a literary weight.

scenes.title: A letter of regret
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Lúcia's regrets. Use at least two inverted conditionals.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At ninety, Dona Lúcia sat down to write a letter she had postponed for more than half a century.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Had I been braver at twenty, I would have crossed the ocean with you that summer.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Were we young again, I believe we would both choose each other without hesitation.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Should these words ever reach you, please know that I carry no bitterness toward the years.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: She sealed the letter slowly, as if each fold added a decade back to the one she had lost.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Unreal past, in grammar and in life, is the tense we reserve for our deepest sincerities.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Unreal Past — Advanced Conditionals". Mixed and inverted conditionals — removing IF and leading with HAD / WERE / SHOULD. Had I known the truth, I would have stayed. Were she here, the conversation would be livelier. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Unreal Past — Advanced Conditionals". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Unreal Past — Advanced Conditionals".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Unreal Past — Advanced Conditionals".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
